summary: Frontend pagination testing for 'Gestión de Predios' page completed successfully. All pagination features are working correctly. The page loads 11,394 predios from Ábrego municipality without freezing, displays only 100 predios per page, and all pagination controls (Primera, Anterior, Siguiente, Última) are functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Pagination state correctly initialized: currentPage=1, pageSize=100 (lines 1344-1345)
✓ Client-side pagination logic correctly implemented using slice() (lines 3081-3083)
✓ Pagination controls render conditionally when predios.length > pageSize (line 3151)
✓ Counter text 'Mostrando X-Y de Z predios' displays correctly (line 3154)
✓ All 4 pagination buttons (Primera, Anterior, Siguiente, Última) are present and functional
✓ Button disabled states work correctly (Primera/Anterior disabled on page 1, Siguiente/Última disabled on last page)
✓ Page indicator shows 'Página X de Y' format correctly
✓ Offline indicator shows correct count of predios saved for offline use
seed_data_creation: None - used existing municipality 'Ábrego' with 11,394 predios
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pagination for 'Gestión de Predios' is fully working. Test municipality: Ábrego (11,394 predios). Route: /dashboard/predios. Pagination uses client-side slicing with pageSize=100. All controls (Primera, Anterior, Siguiente, Última) are functional. Offline indicator shows correct count.

test_pagination_controls_visible.details: All 4 pagination buttons (Primera, Anterior, Siguiente, Última) are visible when predios.length > 100

test_counter_text_displays_correctly.details: Counter shows 'Mostrando 1 - 100 de 11,394 predios' on page 1

test_siguiente_button_navigation.details: Clicking 'Siguiente' changes to 'Mostrando 101 - 200 de 11,394 predios' and 'Página 2 de 114'

test_ultima_button_navigation.details: Clicking 'Última' navigates to last page showing 'Mostrando 11301 - 11394 de 11,394 predios' and 'Página 114 de 114'

test_anterior_button_navigation.details: Clicking 'Anterior' from page 5 navigates back to page 4 showing 'Mostrando 301 - 400 de 11,394 predios'

test_primera_button_navigation.details: Clicking 'Primera' navigates back to page 1 showing 'Mostrando 1 - 100 de 11,394 predios'

test_performance_no_ui_freeze.details: Data loaded in ~8 seconds for 11,394 predios. UI remained responsive throughout pagination testing. No freezing observed.

test_offline_indicator.details: Offline indicator in header shows 'Offline (11,394)' confirming all predios are saved for offline use

test_visible_rows_count.details: Table displays exactly 100 rows per page as expected with pageSize=100
